suggestions: I'm grateful for the quiet peace of the morning before Fajr, setting a calm tone for the day.
I'm thankful for that first cup of teh tarik at the mamak that hits just right.
I'm grateful for the satisfaction of finally squashing that one elusive, persistent bug in the codebase.
I'm thankful for the rezeki of a stable job that allows me to support my family.
I'm grateful for the sound of rain against the window during a long afternoon of coding.
I'm thankful for a clean, successful production deployment without any last-minute fires.
I'm grateful for the weekend catch-up sessions with my parents over a home-cooked meal.
I'm thankful for the camaraderie of colleagues who make even the most intense sprint planning sessions bearable.
I'm grateful for the cooling breeze during the walk to the mosque for Maghrib.
I'm thankful for the flexibility to balance my prayers with my development tasks.
I'm grateful for the feeling of accomplishment when a complex piece of logic finally clicks into place.
I'm thankful for the festive atmosphere and the shared joy during Hari Raya celebrations with relatives.
I'm grateful for the reliable internet connection that keeps me connected to my team and my community.
I'm thankful for the small, unexpected moments of laughter shared with friends over late-night supper.
I'm grateful for the opportunity to learn and grow in my craft every single day.
